title: goniopteris nephrodioides var. biolleyi
intro: Goniopteris nephrodioides var. biolleyi, also known as the Costa Rican Cliff Brake, is a type of fern plant native to Costa Rica, characterized by its distinctive, lobed fronds. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Goniopteris nephrodioides var. biolleyi include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds, infections, and digestive issues. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant's leaves can be prepared by infusing them in hot water to make a tea, or by using them in a poultice to apply directly to affected areas.
